# Session Log - Dungeon Crawler Carl Campaign

*A new adventure begins...*

---

## Session Started: 2026-01-28 21:41:19 UTC

### Session Ended: 2026-01-28 22:46:03 UTC
Session 1: Tandy the Mountain Dwarf Barbarian awoke in the Dungeon Crawler World. Formed alliance with Carl (human Coast Guard) and Princess Donut (talking Persian cat sorceress). Skipped tutorial, rushed into dungeon. Fought and defeated 3 Giant Cave Crickets in first combat - Tandy crushed one with surprise attack, killed another with javelin throw, and did a sassy supermodel walk for the finishing blow (missed, Donut cleaned up). Rescued Squeeks the rat messenger. Looted chitin armor (given to Carl), rusty sword (Carl), glowstone (Donut), tutorial map, gold. Learned about the Butcher - a failed crawler turned mini-boss guarding the stairs. Three paths ahead: LEFT (traps), CENTER (the Butcher), RIGHT (unknown/deadly). Party rested and gathered intel. Ready to proceed to Floor 1 stairs.

---

## Session Started: 2026-01-29 00:05:30 UTC

### Session Ended: 2026-01-29 00:46:09 UTC
Session 2: Tandy led the party through Floor 1's Bone Garden. Attempted distraction on the Butcher but critically failed the throw, triggering combat. Lured the Butcher into trap corridor - took blade trap and dart trap damage but the traps also wounded the Butcher. Fell into pit trap with the Butcher for final confrontation. Raged and fought desperately, calling for allies. Carl threw Donut who delivered the killing blow with a magic bolt. Looted Crawler Badge, 35 gold, and Flask of Oil. Took short rest at stairs, then descended to Floor 2: The Warrens. Met Mongo's Crew at their claimed safe room - Mongo (half-ogre leader), Imani (human crossbow), and Skitch (goblin). Currently negotiating potential alliance.

---

## Session Started: 2026-01-29 01:04:57 UTC

### Session Ended: 2026-01-29 01:29:32 UTC
Session 3: Party explored Floor 2 Warrens. Fought 3 Giant Centipedes in West Tunnel - Mongo nearly died to poison (stabilized by Carl). Retreated to safe room, short rest. Headed East toward screaming sounds. Rescued Imani, Skitch, and Brennan from 2 Cave Stalkers. Tandy's battle cry 'THE MOUNTAIN REMEMBERS' and 'FACE DEATH ITSELF' became signature moves. Alliance offered by Imani's crew. Loot: 9gp, Stalker Claw, Potion of Healing. XP gained: 175 total. Party status: Tandy 10/15 HP, Mongo 3/8 HP. Ended mid-negotiation with potential new allies.

---

## Session Started: 2026-01-29 01:35:25 UTC

### Session Ended: 2026-01-29 01:39:46 UTC
Session 4: Tandy accepted Imani's alliance offer after rescuing her crew from Cave Stalkers. Combined party now 7 strong: Tandy, Carl, Princess Donut, Mongo (wounded), Imani, Skitch, and Brennan (broken leg). Imani enhanced with source material - revealed as a tactical fighter who uses weighted chains. Party faces decision on Brennan's mobility and next steps in the Warrens. Skitch claims knowledge of secret paths. Alliance formed - strength in numbers chosen over independence.

---

## Session Started: 2026-01-29 18:29:53 UTC

## Session Started: 2026-01-30 01:20:02 UTC

### Session Ended: 2026-01-30 01:33:29 UTC
Session 5: Tandy (now Level 3 Berserker) looted the Hive Mother's corpse - gave Queen's Fang to Mongo, kept Hive Mother Chitin x3, Royal Jelly Flask, and 80gp. Descended to Floor 3: The Over City - a massive Roman/Greek ruin the size of Arizona with a fake starlit sky and day/night cycle. Made the critical mistake of running through the night ruins. Nightstalkers (flying pack hunters) ambushed the group - lost 6 of 11 survivors. Tandy took 8 damage (claw wounds). Party of 12 (7 core + 5 survivors) reached village safety. Currently at the village gates, wounded but alive. Night is still dangerous outside.

---

## Session Started: 2026-01-30 01:35:31 UTC

### Session Ended: 2026-01-30 11:21:02 UTC
Development session: Implemented plot management system (dm-plot.sh). No in-game actions occurred - this was a system enhancement session. Party remains at The Desperado Club, Floor 3.

---

## Session Started: 2026-01-30 11:22:20 UTC

### Session Ended: 2026-01-30 21:20:32 UTC
Session 6: MAJOR CHARACTER TRANSFORMATION - Tandy transformed from Mountain Dwarf to Sasquatch (+6 STR, +6 CON, +2 DEX, -3 INT, -1 CHA) and selected Living Siege Weapon class (+4 STR, +6 CON, -4 INT, -2 DEX). Final stats: STR 27, CON 28, INT 1. Gained abilities: Human Shield, Fastball Special, Rampage, Siege Engine. Party visited Desperado Club, consulted Mordecai about race/class selection, then raided Grimaldi's Circus outer perimeter. Combat highlights: Stomped 10 lemurs, destroyed 2 Terror Clowns, executed first successful Fastball Special (threw Carl at clown's back for 36 damage). Collected 107 gold, Minor Potion of Strength, circus tickets. Currently at circus perimeter with Big Top visible, ~2 hours daylight remaining. Tandy is now a 9-foot furry living siege weapon with INT 1 - thinks in simple terms but devastatingly effective in combat.

---

## Session Started: 2026-02-01 22:47:44 UTC

### Session Ended: 2026-02-01 23:19:48 UTC
Session 7: THE MATING DANCE OF DOOM. Tandy led party into Grimaldi's Big Top - a trap with dozens of lemurs, acrobats, and beasts. Discovered Prometheus, an Ancient Red Dragon chained for 300 years. Tandy threw Donut to the cage; she cast Animal Friendship and the dragon submitted to her. While Prometheus broke his chains, Tandy performed a 'beautiful sasquatch mating dance' to distract Grimaldi (Level 85 City Boss). At the dance's climax, threw clown-disguised Carl at Grimaldi (9 damage). Prometheus unleashed 57 fire damage of 300-year rage. Big Top collapsed in flames. Party escaped with new dragon ally. Grimaldi wounded but will resurrect. Carl's dignity: destroyed. Session ended at sunset, party at circus outskirts with Prometheus.

## Session Started: 2026-02-02 14:03:39 UTC

### Session Ended: 2026-02-02 14:33:00 UTC
Session 8: Celebrated circus victory at Desperado Club. Rode Prometheus to village, led flash mob Mating Dance of Doom. Rested at Broken Column Inn. Consulted Mordecai about Grimaldi's resurrection. Mounted Prometheus to hunt weakened City Boss. Descended into the Laughing Crypt beneath the circus ruins.

---

## Session Started: 2026-02-02 14:52:18 UTC

### Session Ended: 2026-02-02 18:13:04 UTC
Session 9: Defeated Grimaldi the Ringmaster (Level 85 City Boss) in the Laughing Crypt. Tandy threw Carl through the ceiling to signal Prometheus. Performed Mating Dance of Doom while dragon incinerated the boss. Leveled from 3 to 5. Gained 8585 gold and epic loot including Ringmaster's Cane of Command. Completed Odette interview - Tandy now #5 overall with 912 million viewers. Party resting in circus ruins with Prometheus.

---

## Session Started: 2026-02-04 15:56:51 UTC

### Session Ended: 2026-02-05 22:28:58 UTC
Session 10: Party celebrated Grimaldi victory with Mating Dance of Doom flash mob in village square. Rested at Broken Column Inn. Consulted Mordecai - learned about 4-day countdown, Remex soul crystal threat, and need to find stairwell to Floor 4. Paid orc merchant for intel on Remex location. Mounted Prometheus, scouted swordsmen warehouse from the air (Perception 18). Landed on roof, descended to upper floor. Met Remex the Grand - a tragic zombified skyfowl tethered to an overloading soul crystal. Remex told his story: wife Miss Quill built swordsmen army with crystal, she died, crystal kept building power for centuries. Crystal cannot be stopped, only contained. Donut's Psi-Fang reacted to the crystal. Session ended mid-encounter with Remex.

---

## Session Started: 2026-02-05 22:46:06 UTC

### Session Ended: 2026-02-06 18:49:42 UTC
Session 11: Contained Remex's city-leveling soul crystal using Sheol Glass Reaper Case and Pus detonator. Tandy fastball-special'd Carl through warehouse wall to find the case. Sat with Remex as he passed - he revealed he was a former crawler turned NPC by the system. Earned Celestial Quest Box (Bandit achievement): Robe of Eyes for Donut, The Crowd Pleaser +1 greataxe for Tandy, Crawler Biscuits x2, 300 gold. Viewers hit 1.2 billion, leaderboard #5. Visited Mordecai at guildhall - he confirmed case is a WMD that can't be inventoried, must be carried by hand. Plans to extract energy on Floor 4 with alchemy table. Case cannot be stabilized.

---

## Session Started: 2026-02-06 20:20:21 UTC

### Session Ended: 2026-02-06 23:45:07 UTC
Session 12: Flew Prometheus from Mordecai's Guildhall to warehouse stairwell. Performed Mating Dance of Doom from rooftop — crowd partially pacified. Fastball Special'd Carl at crossbow crawler threatening Prometheus (21 damage, eliminated). Prepared for magic pulses — stowed magical gear. Mordecai explained pulse mechanics: handle activates on first pulse, 20 min between pulses, stairwell may shield from subsequent pulses. Two-part plan: sprint inside before pulse 2, or Tandy body-shields the case. Party on warehouse rooftop with Katia, awaiting first magic pulse. Case growing more unstable.

---

## Session Started: 2026-02-06 23:59:41 UTC

### Session Ended: 2026-02-08 13:28:56 UTC
Session 13: Tandy swallowed the Sheol Glass Reaper Case whole after performing the Mating Dance of Doom (CON 18 vs DC 15). Grabbed party and leaped off warehouse rooftop — nat 1 Athletics, fell and took 8 damage. First magic pulse hit as they landed at street level. Stairwell door now active with 20 minutes until pulse 2. Prometheus stranded on rooftop. Katia present. Tandy's stomach glowing. 847 million viewers lost their minds.
